raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pirma Deena buhs jums
weena fivehta Safaukschana
buht/ne kahdu Kalposchanas-Dar-
bu buhs jums darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet jums buhs feptin Dee-
nas tam KUNGAM ar Ugguni
uppureht / feptita Deena buhs
weena fivehta Safaukschana / ne
kahdu Kalposchanas-Darbu buhs
jums darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS runnaja
us Mohsu/un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Runna us Israëta Behr-
neim/ un fakti us teem: Kad juhs
tai Semmê nahkfeet / fo es jums
dohschu/un juhs winnas Augtus
planfeet / tad buhs jums weenu
Kuhlixu no juhsu Augtu Pirma-
jeem pee ta Preestera nest.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tam buhs to Kuhlixu
preekſch ta KUNGA kustinaht/ka
tas juhsu pehz labbi patihkans
effus/ tai Deenâ pehz tahs Duffe-
schanas-Deenas buhs tam Pree-
steram to kustinaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jums buhs arridsan tai
Deenâ / kad juhs to kustinajat
weenu gadskahrtigu Jehru / kas
bes Wainas irr fataiſcht / par
Dedsaimu-Uppuri tam KUN-
GAM.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Lihds ar winna Ehdamu-
Uppuri diwi Kweeschu-Miltu
Defmitus ar Etji fajanktus/ tam
KUNGAM par faldu Smar-
schu/ nn winna Dseeramu-Uppu-
ri:no Wihna / weenu Zettortni no
weena Inna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un jums ne buhs ne ka-
du Maisi nedg Eefatu/nedg jaun
Labbihu ehst lihds tai paschat Dee-
nat/ kad juhs juhsu Deetva Uppu-
ri neffifeet / tas lat irr weens Li-
kums pee juhsu Pehznahkameem
wiſſds juhsos Dshwoktös.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz to buhs jums fkaitil
no tahs Deenas pehz tahs Duffe-
schanas-Deenas/ kad juhs ta Ku-
stinaschanas - Uppura Kuhlix-
neffat : feptix pillas Duffesch-
nas-Deenas lai tahs irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lihdstai Deenai pehz tah-
feptitas Duffeschanas-Deenas
buhs jums peeždefimits Deena-
fkaitiht / tad buhs jums ween-
jaunu Ehdamu-Uppuri tam
KUNGAM uppureht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jums buhs no juhfeen
Dshwokteem diwi Maises pa-
Kustinaschanas-Uppuri peeneft
no diwi Kweechu-Miltu Defmi-
teem buhs tahm buht/ ar Rang-
buhs tahs zept / tee irr tee Pi-
majee tam KUNGAM.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jums buhs arridsan ar t-
Maisi feptinx gadsfahrtigu
Jehrus/ kas bes Wainas/ un wee-
nu jaunu Wehrftiti/ un diwi Au-
nus uppureht / teem buhs tam
KUNGAM weens Dedsaim-
Uppurs buht lihds ar winna Eh-
damu-Uppuri un Dedsaim-Uppu-
pneeem/ weens Ugguns par fald-
Sinarschu tam KUNGAM.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jums buhs arridsan wee-
nu Ahfi par Grehku-Uppuri / u-
divi gadskahrtigus Jehrus pa-
Dedsaimu-Uppuri fataiſcht.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
